sections.title: Document Accessibility Remediation Services
sections.description:
Word and PDF documents are essential for sharing important information, but they must comply with Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) and PDF/Universal Accessibility (PDF/UA) standards. Meeting these requirements requires a meticulous, expert approach—something Accessibility Innovations excels at.

Our remediation process ensures that every detail is addressed, from adding clear labeling and optimizing document properties to maintaining structure and readability. Enhancements like logical bookmarks and seamless reading order create an effortless experience for all users, including those using assistive technologies.

We don't just work with Word documents. Our expertise spans various formats, including PDFs, PowerPoint presentations, Excel spreadsheets, and interactive forms. We even handle multimedia accessibility in tools like Adobe InDesign and CorelDRAW. Backed by rigorous quality assurance, we deliver scalable, reliable solutions that ensure your organization meets the highest standards of accessibility and inclusivity.

Contact Accessibility Innovations today to make your documents accessible and take a significant step toward creating an inclusive organization.

image.alt: An illustration of a person holding a lens against a document showing PDF Remediation Services

sections.title: What is Document Remediation
sections.description: Document remediation is the process of transforming digital content to make it inclusive and accessible for all users, including individuals with disabilities. This involves ensuring that documents are navigable, readable, and interactive. Navigable documents are intuitive and easy to explore, even when using assistive technologies like screen readers. Readable documents are optimized for clarity, with proper formatting and structure to enhance comprehension. Additionally, interactive documents are fully functional, allowing users relying on assistive tools to engage seamlessly with elements such as forms, tables, and hyperlinks. Document remediation ensures that digital content is not only compliant with accessibility standards but also provides an inclusive and user-friendly experience for everyone.

sections.title: Why Document Remediation is Important?
sections.description:
Document remediation is essential not only for meeting compliance standards such as WCAG and PDF/UA but also for fostering universal access to information. By breaking down barriers, document remediation ensures inclusivity for individuals of all abilities. Accessible documents expand your audience by accommodating diverse needs, enabling everyone to access and engage with your content. They also enhance user experiences by prioritizing clarity, readability, and usability, making it easier for all users to interact with your materials.

Moreover, accessible documents demonstrate your organization's commitment to inclusivity and compliance, reflecting a forward-thinking and socially responsible approach. At Accessibility Innovations, we ensure that your documents meet the highest standards without compromising quality or integrity. Accessible content is more than compliance—it positions your organization as a leader in inclusivity and innovation.

items.title: Adding alternative text
items.description: We provide concise, descriptive alternative text for all images, charts, and graphics. This allows screen readers to convey the meaning of visual elements to users with visual impairments.

items.title: Correcting reading order
items.description: A logical reading order ensures users of assistive technologies can follow your content seamlessly. We optimize sequencing to make navigation intuitive and user-friendly.

items.title: Structuring headings
items.description: Well-structured, hierarchical headings improve navigation for users with cognitive or visual impairments, enhancing readability and comprehension.

items.title: Adding accessible hyperlinks
items.description: We ensure hyperlinks are descriptive and properly tagged, making navigation clear and easy for users of assistive technologies.

items.title: Enhancing Interactive Elements
items.description: Forms, buttons, and checkboxes are tested and labeled to ensure compatibility with assistive technologies, allowing users to interact without barriers.

items.title: Ensuring color contrast
items.description: We evaluate and adjust color contrast to meet accessibility standards, ensuring content is readable for users with low vision or color blindness.

items.title: Optimizing text content
items.description: Font sizes, styles, and spacing are optimized for legibility and ease of reading, accommodating diverse user needs.

sections.footer_description: By choosing Accessibility Innovations, you'll benefit from our extensive experience, secure processes, and trusted reputation across multiple sectors, ensuring your documents are both accessible and professionally managed.

items.question: Why is document accessibility important?
items.answer: Document accessibility ensures that all individuals, including those with disabilities, can access and interact with the content. It helps organizations comply with legal standards, promote inclusivity, and reach a wider audience.

items.question: What are the common issues in inaccessible documents?
items.answer: Common issues include missing or incorrect headings, lack of alternative text for images, improper table structure, untagged PDFs, poor color contrast, and an illogical reading order.

items.question: How long does document accessibility remediation take?
items.answer: The time required depends on the document's length, complexity, and formatting. Simple documents may take a few hours, while complex files may require days or weeks.

items.question: How do I know if my documents are accessible?
items.answer: Accessible documents meet standards like WCAG or PDF/UA. Testing with automated tools and manual checks, including reviews with assistive technologies, can confirm accessibility.

items.question: What is the cost of document accessibility remediation?
items.answer: Costs vary based on the volume and complexity of the documents. Contact us for a tailored quote based on your specific needs.

items.question: Are your services compliant with legal accessibility requirements?
items.answer: Yes, our services comply with regulations such as the ADA, Section 508, AODA, and WCAG standards, ensuring legal and practical accessibility.

items.question: Is document accessibility remediation a one-time process?
items.answer: No, accessibility is an ongoing process. As new content is created or existing documents are updated, regular checks and remediation are necessary to maintain compliance.

items.question: Who benefits from document accessibility?
items.answer: Document accessibility benefits everyone, including individuals with disabilities, senior citizens, and those using assistive technologies. It also improves usability for all users.
